heading: Your Matches
subtitle: Discover connections across listings, groups, and volunteering
empty_description: Matches will appear here as the system finds connections for you across the platform.
match_hidden: Match hidden — we'll show you fewer like this

banner.no_coords_title: Add your location to see nearby matches
banner.no_coords_desc: We can't calculate distance-based matches until your profile has a location. You can still see matches below based on other signals.
banner.paused_desc: You won't receive new match suggestions or notifications until you resume matching in your preferences.
banner.mutual_desc: These matches go both ways — you're a great fit for them, and they're a great fit for you.

explanation.ai_caption: AI-generated explanation based on your profile and activity

empty.no_coordinates_title: We need your location to find matches
empty.no_coordinates_description: Add a location to your profile so we can find listings, groups, and opportunities near you.
empty.no_listings_description: Create a listing to start finding people, groups, and opportunities that match what you offer or need.

preferences.heading: Match Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Control how Smart Matching finds and notifies you about connections.
preferences.load_failed: Failed to load your match preferences
preferences.load_error_desc: Your saved preferences couldn't be loaded. Editing is disabled so they aren't overwritten with defaults.

pause.title: Pause matching
pause.description: When paused, you won't get new match suggestions or notifications.
pause.active_description: Matching is paused — you won't get new suggestions or notifications until you resume.

thresholds.title: Distance & quality
thresholds.no_location_title: Add a location to use distance-based matching
thresholds.no_location_desc: Set your location in your profile to get matches ranked by how close they are to you.

categories.title: Category interests
categories.description: Choose the categories you'd like to be matched on. Leave everything unchecked to match on all categories.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.hot_matches_desc: Get notified right away about exceptionally strong matches.
notifications.mutual_matches_desc: Get notified when a match goes both ways.
